description: green-ai context model — how working context (user, customer, profile) is established and flows through the system. Machine-readable. Used by AI to determine what ICurrentUser state is available at each layer.

identity_model.description: Three-tier identity. Each tier must be established before the next can be accessed.

tiers.available_after: select-customer response OR auto-select if single membership
tiers.auto_select_rule: single membership → skip select-customer, include customer_id in login response

tiers.established_by: POST /auth/select-profile — final JWT issued with ProfileId
tiers.available_after: select-profile response OR auto-select if single profile
tiers.auto_select_rule: single profile → skip select-profile, include profile_id in login/select-customer response
tiers.invariant: ProfileId(0) MUST NEVER be issued. Guards exist in SelectProfileHandler.

blazor_contract.set_in: OnAfterRenderAsync(bool firstRender) — ONLY on firstRender == true
blazor_contract.never_set_in: OnInitializedAsync — prerender runs before circuit, JWT unavailable

handler_context_availability.description: What ICurrentUser properties are populated at each handler layer

available: none — ICurrentUser is empty; handlers use explicit command parameters

profile_handlers.tenant_rule: ALL SQL queries against tenant tables MUST include WHERE CustomerId = @CustomerId

endpoint.context_access: none — endpoints call mediator.Send only, never access ICurrentUser

pipeline.context_access: authorizationBehavior reads ICurrentUser.UserId to check IsAuthenticated

repository.context_access: indirect — handler passes CustomerId/ProfileId as parameters to SQL

blazor_page.context_access: PrincipalHolder.Set(authState.User) gives ICurrentUser to all handlers dispatched from this page

tenant_isolation_rules.rule: ALL queries against tenant tables require WHERE CustomerId = @CustomerId
Pre-auth tables (UserRoles, ProfileRoles, Languages, Countries) have NO CustomerId
tenant_isolation_rules.why: These are global reference data, not per-tenant data
